thranduil.name: Thranduil the Wise
thranduil.title: Former High Council Leader

perk.name: Diplomatic Mastery
perk.description: Can negotiate with hostile groups, +30% chance to avoid combat

thranduil.backstory: Led the council for 200 years. His followers are loyal but aging.

aelindra.name: Aelindra Swifthunter
aelindra.title: Master of the Hunt

perk.name: Expert Foraging
perk.description: +60% food from hunting and foraging events

aelindra.backstory: Knows every beast and plant in the forest. Small but skilled group.

miriel.name: Miriel Starweaver
miriel.title: Archmage of the Grove

perk.name: Arcane Knowledge
perk.description: Can use powerful magic, +3 mana per day, spells cost -25%

miriel.backstory: The most powerful mage, but few trust magic anymore.

kael.name: Kael Ironbark
kael.title: Captain of the Guard

perk.name: Tactical Warfare
perk.description: +50% combat power, lose 30% fewer followers in battles

kael.backstory: Veteran warrior with disciplined soldiers. Ready for anything.

lyra.name: Lyra Moonwhisper
lyra.title: High Priestess

perk.name: Divine Blessing
perk.description: Followers recover 2 health per day, +40% disease resistance

lyra.backstory: Beloved by the faithful. Her prayers sustain the wounded.

fenris.name: Fenris Shadowstep
fenris.title: Master Scout

perk.name: Pathfinder
perk.description: +35% travel speed, can see danger ratings on routes

fenris.backstory: Knows secret paths and shortcuts. His scouts are the fastest.

aldric.name: Aldric Goldleaf
aldric.title: Merchant Guildmaster

perk.name: Trade Network
perk.description: Start with +200 gold, -35% shop prices, +25% selling prices

aldric.backstory: Wealthy and connected. His caravan is well-supplied.

thalion.name: Thalion Earthshaper
thalion.title: Master Builder

perk.name: Engineering Genius
perk.description: Can build defenses, bridges. -50% damage from environmental hazards

thalion.backstory: Built the great halls. His workers can overcome any obstacle.

seraphina.name: Seraphina Dawnbringer
seraphina.title: Oracle of the Stars

perk.name: Foresight
perk.description: +40% luck, can reroll one bad event per landmark

seraphina.backstory: Sees glimpses of the future. Her visions have saved many.

vorian.name: Vorian the Unyielding
vorian.title: Berserker Chief

perk.name: Fearless Horde
perk.description: +70% combat power but -20% diplomacy, followers fight harder

vorian.backstory: The largest warband. They never retreat, never surrender.
